creator: junker@moderato.snu.ac.kr
text:
These are new or updated ports of korean.

New ports:

kr-afterstep.ports.tar.gz
	Korean patch version AfterStep window manager, 1.0pre3h1
kr-elm.ports.tar.gz
	Korean patch version of elm mail user agent, 2.4pl25-h4.1
kr-fvwm95.ports.tar.gz
	Korean patch version of FVWM95 window manager, 2.0.42ah3
kr-han.ports.tar.gz
	Korean version of kon, called han. 1.0fb
kr-hanemacs.ports.tar.gz
	Korean version of GNU emacs, 19.34b1
kr-hanmutt.ports.tar.gz
	Korean version of mutt mail user agent, 0.60h9
kr-helvis.ports.tar.gz
	Korean version of elvis, 1.8h2-
kr-hfvwm2.ports.tar.gz
	Korean version of Fvwm window manager, 2.0.43
kr-hlatexpsfonts.ports.tar.gz
	Type 1 font collection of Hangul fonts, used by HLaTeX-0.95
	and other applications(such as nh2ps, nhppf)
kr-hpscat.ports.tar.gz
	an a2ps-like program printing Hangul character
kr-linuxdoc-sgml.ports.tar.gz
	Korean patch version of Linuxdoc-SGML, 1.6bh2
kr-netscape3.ports.tar.gz
	Netscape International version, hacked from Netscape-3.01 inter-
	national version of OSF/1 2.0.
kr-nh2ps.ports.tar.gz
	a2ps hack for printing Hangul, 1.0p1
kr-nhppf.ports.tar.gz
	Netscape 2.x an 3.x Hangul printing filter, 1.2
kr-pine.ports.tar.gz
	Korean patch version of pine-3.96, 3.96k
kr-ztelnet.ports.tar.gz
	a telnet hack for transferring zmodem download(upload is buggy)

Updated:
kr-hmconv.ports.tar.gz
	Hangul Mail code converter(euc-kr <-> iso-2022-kr)
	I omitted hmconv binary in pkg/PLIST

How-To-Repeat: 
Get ports from ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/

-rwxr-x---  1 201  1          4515 Apr 18 00:07 kr-afterstep.ports.tar.gz
-rwxr-x---  1 201  1          3966 Apr 18 00:07 kr-elm.ports.tar.gz
-rwxr-x---  1 201  1         10489 Apr 18 00:07 kr-fvwm95.ports.tar.gz
-rwxr-x---  1 201  1          1394 Apr 18 00:11 kr-han.ports.tar.gz
-rwxr-x---  1 201  1         12952 Apr 18 00:11 kr-hanemacs.ports.tar.gz
-rwxr-x---  1 201  1          1298 Apr 18 00:11 kr-hanmutt.ports.tar.gz
-rwxr-x---  1 201  1          4173 Apr 18 00:11 kr-helvis.ports.tar.gz
-rwxr-x---  1 201  1          2749 Apr 18 00:11 kr-hfvwm2.ports.tar.gz
-rwxr-x---  1 201  1          3017 Apr 18 00:11 kr-hlatexpsfonts.ports.tar.gz
-rwxr-x---  1 201  1          1343 Apr 18 00:12 kr-hmconv.ports.tar.gz
-rwxr-x---  1 201  1          2276 Apr 18 00:12 kr-hpscat.ports.tar.gz
-rwxr-x---  1 201  1          2009 Apr 18 00:12 kr-linuxdoc-sgml.ports.tar.gz
-rwxr-x---  1 201  1          6671 Apr 18 00:12 kr-netscape3.ports.tar.gz
-rwxr-x---  1 201  1          3889 Apr 18 00:12 kr-nh2ps.ports.tar.gz
-rwxr-x---  1 201  1          1172 Apr 18 00:12 kr-nhppf.ports.tar.gz
-rwxr-x---  1 201  1         14485 Apr 18 00:12 kr-pine.ports.tar.gz
-rwxr-x---  1 201  1          1774 Apr 18 00:12 kr-ztelnet.ports.tar.gz

Then 'make' in each subdirectory.
